title: Fix DPI-C and protect-lib if port is implicit logic
body:
I found that if input is an unpacked array of 1 bit wire without `logic` keyword such as `input in[2]`, the generated protect-lib wrapper contains LOGIC_IMPLICIT.
And the temporary variable for such case was svLogicVecVal, but it should be svLogic.

This PR takes care of such case that is tested in 89ceb2e5b19a8627acf2af0752bebb2c0444c392 .
